0.response: {"Q0":"Strategy? well for the galaxy I pick the higher numbers to give myself the best chance. For planets it really came down to which astronaut left which planet. I my case it was the blue planet so I hyper focused all my energy on the red planet. And for meteror shower round I only picked up the red gems and green ones."}
